content.full_text:
April 19, 1990

Jaye Carr, City Clerk
City of Menlo Park
701 Laurel Street
Menlo Park, CA 94025

Re: Your Request For Advice
Our File No. A-90-243

Dear Ms. Carr:

You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to you concerning the conflict of interest disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.1/

Your letter, dated March 22, 1990, correctly summarizes my advice that Mr. Bedwell and Mr. Richert may each combine their 1989 annual statements of economic interests with their leaving office statements. The period covered by each statement will be January 1, 1989, through the date the filer left office. For Mr. Reichert, the closing date will be February 21, 1990. Mr. Bedwell's closing date will be February 15, 1990, the last day he was authorized to act as city manager.

Your new city manager, Jan Dolan, will be required to file her first annual statement on April 1, 1991, covering the period January 16, 1990 through December 31, 1990.

A copy of your letter is enclosed for your convenience.

1/ Government Code Section 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

Please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you have additional questions.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Colleen McGee
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosure
